title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 209.289 - Coordinator to be hired, qualifications, salary and expenses
text:
209.289.  Coordinator to be hired, qualifications, salary and expenses. — The executive director shall hire a coordinator, who shall serve as coordinator of the Missouri interpreters certification system.  The coordinator shall have a background in interpreter testing and interpreting.  The salary and office space for the coordinator shall be appropriated to and provided by the commission.  The salary of the coordinator shall be paid out of general revenue funds.  All other expenses for the administration of sections 209.287 to 209.318 shall be paid from the interpreters fund established in section 209.318.
(L. 1994 S.B. 568 § 3)
